name: github-actions-psmodule-release
description: GitHub Actions release workflow for PowerShell modules: use commit-and-tag-version to bump version, update .psd1 ModuleVersion via pwsh regex, push with --follow-tags, publish via Publish-Module -NuGetApiKey, create release via softprops/action-gh-release@v2. Guard infinite loops with if: \!startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, 'chore(release):'). fetch-depth: 0 required for commit-and-tag-version changelog history.
